description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that caches the vendor/ directory and includes the Dependency-Scanning.gitlab-ci.yml template, with a single stage named test. Add a test:8.3 job in the test stage using the php:8.3 Docker image that runs a before_script installing git, wget, unzip, the bcmath extension, installing and enabling Xdebug via pecl, downloading the Composer installer signature, verifying and installing Composer, then runs php composer.phar update; then its script executes XDEBUG_MODE=coverage vendor/bin/phpunit --configuration phpunit.xml --coverage-text --colors=never --coverage-cobertura=coverage.cobertura.xml and publishes a cobertura coverage report at coverage.cobertura.xml as an artifact. Add a test:8.4 job in the test stage using the php:8.4 Docker image with the same before_script steps and a script that runs XDEBUG_MODE=coverage vendor/bin/phpunit --configuration phpunit.xml --colors=never. Both jobs inherit the vendor/ cache and have no branch or tag restrictions, so they run on every pipeline. Ensure the coverage regex `/^\s*Lines:\s*\d+.\d+\%/` is used for the test:8.3 job.
